mapper.sql: id, user_id, receiver, mobile, detail, is_default, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM user_address WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY is_default DESC, update_time DESC, id DESC

SELECT
FROM user_address WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND is_default = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_address ( user_id, receiver, mobile, detail, is_default ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{receiver}, #{mobile}, #{detail}, #{isDefault} )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_address SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND is_default = 1
